name: Basilica of Bom Jesus
description: UNESCO World Heritage church housing St. Francis Xavier's remains.

name: Baga Beach
description: Lively beach with water sports, shacks and vibrant nightlife.

name: Fort Aguada
description: 17th-century Portuguese fort with panoramic Arabian Sea views.

name: Thalassa
description: Iconic Greek restaurant perched on a cliff overlooking the sea.

name: Dudhsagar Falls
description: Spectacular four-tiered waterfall on the Goa-Karnataka border.

name: Palolem Beach
description: Crescent-shaped paradise beach with calm waters, ideal for swimming.

name: Spice Plantation Tour
description: Walking tour through cardamom, vanilla and pepper plantations.

name: Anjuna Flea Market
description: Famous Wednesday market with crafts, clothes and local food.

name: Goa Marriott Resort
description: Luxury waterfront resort in Panaji with pool and spa.

name: Cafe Mambo
description: Beachside cafe known for seafood thali and chilled vibes.

name: Amber Fort
description: Majestic hilltop fort with intricate mirror work and elephant rides.

name: Hawa Mahal
description: Palace of Winds — iconic five-storey honeycomb façade with 953 windows.

name: City Palace
description: Royal palace complex still partly inhabited by the Jaipur royal family.

name: Nahargarh Fort
description: Hilltop fort with the best sunset views over the Pink City.

name: LMB Restaurant
description: Legendary restaurant serving authentic Rajasthani thali since 1954.

name: Chokhi Dhani
description: Ethnic village resort with folk music, dance and unlimited Rajasthani food.

name: Jantar Mantar
description: UNESCO-listed 18th-century astronomical observatory with giant instruments.

name: Johari Bazaar
description: Famous jewellery market — best place for kundan, meenakari and lac bangles.

name: Jal Mahal
description: Water Palace floating in the middle of Man Sagar Lake — stunning at sunrise.

name: Dera Amer Jungle Camp
description: Luxury tented camp with elephant interactions and heritage walks.

name: Alleppey Backwaters
description: Overnight houseboat cruise through Kerala's iconic canal network.

name: Munnar Tea Gardens
description: Rolling hills carpeted with tea estates at 1600m altitude.

name: Fort Kochi
description: Colonial heritage district with Chinese fishing nets, synagogues and spice markets.

name: Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary
description: Tiger reserve with boat safari on Periyar Lake spotting elephants and bison.

name: Varkala Cliff Beach
description: Red laterite cliffs dropping to pristine beach with natural spring.

name: Kathakali Show Kochi
description: Classical Kerala dance-drama with elaborate makeup and costumes.

name: Kovalam Beach
description: Crescent beach with lighthouse, ayurveda centres and seafood restaurants.

name: Spice Garden Kumily
description: Guided tour of organic cardamom, pepper, and coffee plantation.

name: Coconut Lagoon Resort
description: Heritage villa resort accessible only by boat on Vembanad Lake.

name: Thalappakatti Restaurant
description: Legendary biryani house serving Dindigul-style mutton biryani since 1957.

name: Sarnath Museum
description: Buddhist heritage site near Varanasi with ancient artifacts.

name: Dasaswamedha Ghat
description: Charming ghats with views of the Ganges and daily rituals.

name: Kashi Vishwanath Temple
description: One of Hinduism's most sacred temples in the city of light.

name: Assi Ghat
description: Evening rituals by the river with a serene vibe.

name: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) Campus
description: Historic campus with a central museum and beautiful architecture.

name: Jhansi ki Rani Bridge
description: Historic bridge with colonial-era charm.

name: Assi Dairy & Sweets
description: Local sweets and snacks with a riverside view.

name: Chetak Arts & Crafts
description: Local handicrafts and textiles stalls near the ghats.

name: Tulsi Ghat
description: Religious site with ancient steps and a tranquil vibe.

name: Sarnath Ruins Park
description: Excavated ruins of one of Buddhism's most important sites.
